category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a highly customizable changelog generator; official docs describe generating changelogs from Git history.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-cliff; official repository and docs use git-cliff.
docs_sources: Official project documentation is hosted at git-cliff.org/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/orhun/git-cliff, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a changelog generator; official docs describe Git history and Conventional Commits usage.
